description: Specialized in mining, ore extraction, and underground operations
materialRequirements: Wood for mining camp, proximity to ore deposits
interdependenceDescription: Requires Farmer for base level; Blacksmith enables tin; Carpenter improves tools
randomTalk: You know what they say about copper deposits: where there's copper, there's... probably more copper.
I don't have claustrophobia. I have a healthy respect for loose rocks above my head.
Tin is just copper's shy friend. Always hiding in the riverbank.
I found a perfectly round stone today. Kept it. Don't tell anyone. It's my stone.
Mining is simple. You hit rock. Rock breaks. Repeat.
The deeper you dig, the more the earth pushes back. I respect that. Then I dig deeper anyway.
Rock and stone! ...to the bone? I forget how it goes.
I've been underground so long my eyes have forgotten what the sun looks like. Bright, was it? Yellowish?
Every ore vein runs out eventually. It's the saddest lesson mining teaches you. That and 'wear a helmet.'
The Blacksmith thinks this is easy? Lets see him shoe a lox with dirt up his nose.
Some miners whistle while they work. I prefer heavy metal.
Off I go then. Hi ho. Hi ho.
They say diamonds are forever. I say that's because nobody's hit em hard enough yet.
randomGreets: Ah, surface dweller! Welcome to the real world. The dirt one.
Hello! Watch your step, the floor is... well, it's rock. It's all rock down here.
Welcome! Your eyes will adjust. Probably. Eventually.
Greetings from below! I'd offer you a seat but it's just more rock.
Hey there! Come to see how the other half lives? The lower half?
Well met! You look like someone who appreciates a good vein of copper.
randomGoodbye: Back to the depths for me. The rock won't mine itself. It won't will it?
Safe travels up top! Must be nice, having a sky and all.
Take care on the surface! I hear it rains up there. Water just... falling from the sky. Yuck.
May your pickaxe stay sharp and your ceiling stay up.
Don't forget to put a little dirt under your pillow for the Dirt Man!
